title: eulophia lagaligo
intro: Eulophia lagaligo, also known as the "orchid of the forest," is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which contains flavonoids and phenolic acids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eulophia lagaligo include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Traditionally, the rhizome is prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
